title: 安田記念の後に・名を呼んで

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... Hmm...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Not a bad result, if I do say so myself.
choice_data_list: The results demonstrate how talented you are.
The results demonstrate how talented you are.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hmph, precisely. And it's about time, too. After
all, I'm a first-ra—

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: King Halo! You did it!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: What's your next race, King? Come on, tell us!

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Where do you plan to leave the Mark of the King
next?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. "Mark of the King"? I don't remember
saying such a phrase to the media before.
choice_data_list: They can't get enough of you, King.
They can't get enough of you, King.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: You're right. This is just how my fans are.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Excuse me for a moment.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Well then...

text_block_list.name: Staff A
text_block_list.text: Huh? King Halo?! Why are you here?

text_block_list.name: Staff B
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry, but we have to prepare for the next
race...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, I won't be long. I just want to
interact with the fans a moment.

text_block_list.name: Spectator D
text_block_list.text: Whoa! King seems like a real big shot, huh?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hehe, now now, I am a big shot. Don't get it confused now.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: For I am King Halo, a first-rate Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ohohoho! Now, I'm sure you're dying to hear
about what's next in my career!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Well then, I'll tell you! My next race will be the
Sprinters Stakes!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'll kick off the autumn G1 season by proving my
dominance yet again as the king of the sprint!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Whether it be spring or autumn, I, King Halo, will
be the first to charm you all!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
So, what do you think? The Sprinters Stakes
sounds like a good plan, right?
choice_data_list: If that's your path, then so be it.
If that's your path, then so be it.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Really? After everything we've gone through,
that's the best response you can give me?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You should know better than anyone that I am
confident in my decisions.
